properties.name: spring.ai.vllm.scoring.api-key
properties.description: vLLM API Key. Optional if vLLM server is not secured.

properties.name: spring.ai.vllm.scoring.options.model
properties.description: The name of the scoring model to use (e.g., 'BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3').

properties.name: spring.ai.vllm.scoring.options.top-n
properties.description: Number of top documents to return.

properties.name: spring.ai.vllm.scoring.options.return-documents
properties.description: Whether to return the original document texts.

properties.name: spring.ai.vllm.scoring.options.truncation
properties.description: Whether to truncate documents to fit the model's context window.
